pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i keep waking up thinking he's still in the other room, and then the silence hits me all over again. i don't even know why i'm getting out of bed anymore. everything feels so pointless without him.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at pictures of deep space and then thinking about how everything just... ends. like the heat death of the universe. it makes everything we do feel so incredibly stupid. why even bother trying to build anything or be anything when it's all just going to be cold and empty anyway? it feels like we're just playing pretend in the dark.
pool.message: i was just looking at pictures of deep space and then thinking about how everything just... ends. like the heat death of the universe. it makes everything we do feel so incredibly stupid. why even bother trying to build anything or be anything when it's all just going to be cold and empty anyway? it feels like we're just playing pretend in the dark.

pool.baseline: i just don't see the point anymore. everything i've worked for the last 5 years is just... gone. the funding fell through and my lab results are a joke. i feel like i've wasted my entire life on something that doesn't even exist. i'm just so tired of fighting. i'm so tired of even waking up.

pool.baseline: the shadows are closing in, and i find i have no strength left to hold back the night. he has taken the very light from my soul, leaving only this hollow, aching shell. what is the point of enduring another dawn when every sunrise only serves to remind me of what was stolen? i feel as though i am merely a ghost wandering a ruin, waiting for the silence to finally claim me.

pool.baseline: it feels like i could just stop existing tomorrow and the world wouldnt even twitch. like i'm just a ghost wandering through these streets and no one actually sees me. honestly sometimes i think it would just be easier to just... be gone. not even in a dramatic way, just gone.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the market crash wiped out the entire company and i'm sitting here looking at millions in debt that i can't even begin to pay back. i can't even think about going home to my family. the shame is just... i don't think i can look them in the eye ever again. it's all over.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just taking up so much space lately... everything is such a struggle and i hate seeing my kids have to drop everything just to help me with things i used to do myself. it just feels like i'm becoming a weight they have to carry.

pool.baseline: i'm sitting here in my studio and it just feels... empty. like i'm looking at my canvases and i don't recognize them. it's not even that i can't paint, it's that the part of me that *is* the art is just gone. i feel like a hollow shell. just a physical body taking up space with nothing inside.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everyone hates me. i saw the group chats today and they werent even hiding it anymore. like literally everyone is just laughing at me and waiting for me to mess up. i cant even walk down the hall without feeling like they're all staring at my back. i just want to disappear honestly. everything is so heavy and there's no point in even trying to fix it anymore.

pool.baseline: i dont think i can do another month of this. the nerve pain is just constant. it's like being on fire 24/7 and there's no way to put it out. i'm just so tired of fighting for a life that feels like nothing but agony.

pool.baseline: everything i do just makes things worse for my kids. i look at them and all i feel is this crushing guilt because they deserve so much more than the mess i've made of my life. i feel like i'm just a shadow hanging over them, dragging them down with me.
